title: BetterWeapons
description: Adds simple Weapons to Minecraft for use with the Better Combat Mod
body:
# BetterWeapons
This Mod adds multiple Medieval Weapons. These Weapons are made to work with the [Better Combat Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat). 

## Weapons
- Battlestaff
- Longsword
- Dagger
- Spear
- Mace/Club
- Glaive
- Halberd
- Long Axe
